name: Zombies Ate My Femboy
short_description: A Run-and-Gun indie shooter! Avoid various monster and save big booba women! 9 playable levels with 7 different enemies!
detailed_description:
Play as a femboy as you run and gun to save big booba women!

2 playable characters to choose from! Either play as a spicy femboy or a cute furry otter UwU

9 cheesy levels to explore! From spooky suburbs, to ancient pyramids, to fast food restaurants, to your local football field!

Collect and use 4 different weapons! From water guns, forks, plates, and even bazookas!

Battle terrible monster such as zombies, werewolves, vampires, spooky girls, indestructible landsharks, and even blobs! Finally, you deal with the greatest monster ever! A giant crab!!!

WASD keys to move, Space to fire, E to weapon swap
